# Water Heater SOS

> Water Heater SOS is the Inland Empire's licensed water heater, HVAC, and plumbing contractor. We provide 24/7 emergency service across Riverside County and San Bernardino County for water heaters (gas, electric, tankless, heat pump), full HVAC (AC, heating, indoor air quality), and home plumbing. Licensed (CA LIC# 1140776, C-20 classification under CSLB), insured, and 5-star rated.

Contact: (800) 697-4014
Email: info@waterheatersos.com
Location: 571 Crane St, Unit H, Lake Elsinore, CA 92530 (serving the entire Inland Empire)

## HVAC Services

- [HVAC Services](https://waterheatersos.com/hvac-services): Full-service HVAC contractor — AC, heating, and indoor air quality solutions across the Inland Empire.
- [AC Services](https://waterheatersos.com/ac-services): Air conditioning repair, installation, and maintenance for residential systems.
- [AC Repair](https://waterheatersos.com/ac-repair): 24/7 emergency AC repair. Most repairs $150–$800. Same-day service across Riverside and San Bernardino counties.
- [AC Installation](https://waterheatersos.com/ac-installation): New AC system installation and replacement. SEER2 14.3 minimum CA standard, high-efficiency upsell available.
- [AC Maintenance](https://waterheatersos.com/ac-maintenance): Pre-summer tune-ups and annual maintenance to extend AC lifespan and reduce energy bills.
- [Mini-Split Installation](https://waterheatersos.com/mini-split-installation): Ductless mini-split installation for ADUs, garage conversions, and zone-by-zone cooling.
- [Thermostat Installation](https://waterheatersos.com/thermostat-installation): Smart thermostat installation (Nest, ecobee, Honeywell) with C-wire troubleshooting.
- [Heating Services](https://waterheatersos.com/heating-services): Furnace repair, installation, maintenance, and heat pump systems for Inland Empire homes.
- [Furnace Repair](https://waterheatersos.com/furnace-repair): Emergency furnace repair including ignitor, blower motor, gas valve, and heat exchanger issues.
- [Furnace Installation](https://waterheatersos.com/furnace-installation): High-efficiency gas furnace replacement and installation. AFUE 90%+ standard.
- [Furnace Maintenance](https://waterheatersos.com/furnace-maintenance): Pre-winter furnace tune-ups including CO safety inspection.
- [Heat Pump Systems](https://waterheatersos.com/heat-pump-systems): All-electric heating and cooling. CA + IRA rebates available. Designed for the Inland Empire's mild climate.
- [HVAC Maintenance Plan](https://waterheatersos.com/hvac-maintenance-plan): Annual maintenance plans with tune-ups, repair discounts, priority scheduling, and waived diagnostic fees.
- [Indoor Air Quality](https://waterheatersos.com/indoor-air-quality): Whole-home air quality solutions including filtration, UV-C purifiers, humidifiers, and dehumidifiers.
- [Air Filtration Systems](https://waterheatersos.com/air-filtration): Whole-home air filtration including MERV 13+ media, HEPA bypass systems, and UV-C add-ons. Wildfire smoke protection.
- [Air Duct Cleaning](https://waterheatersos.com/air-duct-cleaning): Whole-home duct cleaning for HVAC efficiency and indoor air quality.
- [Whole-Home Humidifier](https://waterheatersos.com/whole-home-humidifier): Whole-home humidifier installation to address dry winter air typical in the Inland Empire's Mediterranean climate.
- [Whole-Home Dehumidifier](https://waterheatersos.com/whole-home-dehumidifier): Whole-home dehumidifier installation for summer monsoon and coastal-influenced humidity periods.

## Water Heater Services

- [Water Heater Services](https://waterheatersos.com/water-heater-services): Overview of all water heater repair, installation, and replacement services.
- [Gas Water Heaters](https://waterheatersos.com/gas-water-heaters): Repair and replacement of gas water heaters, including pilot light issues, thermostat problems, and tank replacements.
- [Tankless Water Heaters](https://waterheatersos.com/tankless-water-heaters): Installation and repair of energy-efficient tankless water heater systems.
- [Heat Pump Water Heaters](https://waterheatersos.com/heat-pump-water-heaters): Installation and service of eco-friendly heat pump water heaters. Pairs naturally with heat pump HVAC systems.
- [Electric Water Heaters](https://waterheatersos.com/electric-water-heaters): Repair and installation of electric water heater systems.
- [Water Heater Flush](https://waterheatersos.com/water-heater-flush): Annual sediment flush maintenance to extend water heater lifespan.

## Plumbing Services

- [Plumbing Services](https://waterheatersos.com/plumbing): Comprehensive plumbing services including repairs and installations.
- [Drain Cleaning](https://waterheatersos.com/drain-cleaning): Professional drain cleaning and clog removal services.
- [Hydro-Jetting](https://waterheatersos.com/hydro-jetting): High-pressure water jetting for tough clogs and pipe cleaning.
- [Leak Detection](https://waterheatersos.com/leak-detection-services): Advanced leak detection technology to find hidden leaks.
- [Whole-House Repiping](https://waterheatersos.com/whole-house-repipe): Complete home repiping services for older plumbing systems.
- [Water Filtration](https://waterheatersos.com/water-filtration): Water softeners and filtration system installation.
- [Gas Leak Repairs](https://waterheatersos.com/gas-leak-repairs): Emergency gas leak detection and repair services.
- [Sewer Camera Inspection](https://waterheatersos.com/sewer-camera-inspection): Video pipe inspection for diagnosis without excavation.
- [Toilet Repair & Replacement](https://waterheatersos.com/toilet-repair-replacement): Toilet repair, replacement, and new installation.
- [Faucet Repair & Replacement](https://waterheatersos.com/faucet-repair-replacement): Faucet repair and replacement throughout the home.
- [Shower Repair & Replacement](https://waterheatersos.com/shower-repair-replacement): Shower installation and repair.
- [Garbage Disposal](https://waterheatersos.com/garbage-disposal-repair-replacement): Garbage disposal repair and replacement.
- [Sump Pump Services](https://waterheatersos.com/sump-pump-repair-replacement): Sump pump installation, repair, and replacement.
- [Water Pressure Regulator](https://waterheatersos.com/water-pressure-regulator-replacement): Water pressure regulator replacement and pressure problem diagnosis.
- [Water Service Repair](https://waterheatersos.com/water-service-repair-replacement): Main water service line repair and replacement.
- [Moen Flo Smart Water Monitor](https://waterheatersos.com/moen-flo-smart-water-monitor): Smart water monitoring system installation.
- [Reverse Osmosis](https://waterheatersos.com/reverse-osmosis): Reverse osmosis drinking water system installation.

- [Fontana](https://waterheatersos.com/fontana): HVAC, water heater, and plumbing services in Fontana, CA.

- [Moreno Valley](https://waterheatersos.com/moreno-valley): HVAC, water heater, and plumbing services in Moreno Valley, CA.
- [Temecula](https://waterheatersos.com/temecula): HVAC, water heater, and plumbing services in Temecula, CA.
- [Murrieta](https://waterheatersos.com/murrieta): HVAC, water heater, and plumbing services in Murrieta, CA.
- [Lake Elsinore](https://waterheatersos.com/lake-elsinore): HVAC, water heater, and plumbing services in Lake Elsinore, CA (our headquarters).
- [Menifee](https://waterheatersos.com/menifee): HVAC, water heater, and plumbing services in Menifee, CA.
- [Perris](https://waterheatersos.com/perris): HVAC, water heater, and plumbing services in Perris, CA.
- [Hemet](https://waterheatersos.com/hemet): HVAC, water heater, and plumbing services in Hemet, CA.
- [Yucaipa](https://waterheatersos.com/yucaipa): HVAC, water heater, and plumbing services in Yucaipa, CA.
